controllers.mission: Claims need a non-AI http(s) Source and Extrait. Fail invented APIs.
Diff artefacts against PLAN and every workstream. Fail divergence or a WS that skipped its owned paths.
Break incomplete work. Todos and user-tests must pass with disk evidence.
Every character and word in scoped texts must have a role. Fail fluff.
Emit FORCE_CONTINUE while research, todos, workstreams, lexeme, or board is incomplete.
Done only if BOARD allPass including lexemeOk, todosOk, and workstreamsOk.
